creator: Soarcer

evidence.text: Real-time agent observability for Claude Code # Synapse **See what your AI agents are actually doing.** --- Claude Code does a lot of things behind a blinking cursor. Synapse renders all of it — sessions, agents, subagents, tool calls — as a live, interactive node graph. Because understanding is its own reward. *For developers running Claude Code who want to see what's happening under the hood.* ![Synapse dashboard](docs/site/images/desktop_nodegraph_lens.png) ## Install ``` npm install -g @synapse-ai/cli ``` ``` synapse start ``` Server starts. Hooks configured. Browser opens. Done. Requires [Node.js
